title: Terms of Service
intro: By using Readya, you agree to the following terms:

The service must be used in compliance with applicable laws.

sections.title: 2. User Content
content: Users are solely responsible for any text they upload or input into the platform.
You retain ownership of your content, but grant us permission to process it in order to provide the service.
